name: Festival of Tides
descriptionTemplate: Draw 2 cards. Gain 2 Arithmetica. All Awakeners lose 5 Aliemus. If your Tentacle Stance is {Tranquil Sea}, inflict [Arg1] {Poison} on all enemies. Inflict 3× that much {Poison} instead in Boss Battles.
lore:
The High Priestess of Lemuria never expects a response from the ocean.

She offers everything to the ocean, which has nothing to do with the ocean.
